SEARCH

Uses of Class
co.edu.unbosque.venta.dto.FacturaDTO

Packages that use FacturaDTO
Package
Description
co.edu.unbosque.venta.controller
Package containing REST controllers for managing sale details (DetalleVenta) and related operations in the sales(Venta) management system.
co.edu.unbosque.venta.service
Package containing service classes responsible for handling business logic related to sales management, including creation of sales, interaction with external services, and generation of sales reports and invoices.

  • Uses of FacturaDTO in co.edu.unbosque.venta.controller

    Methods in co.edu.unbosque.venta.controller that return types with arguments of type FacturaDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<FacturaDTO>
    VentaController.obtenerFactura(Long codigoVenta)
    Retrieves the invoice (FacturaDTO) for a sale by its code.

  • Uses of FacturaDTO in co.edu.unbosque.venta.service

    Methods in co.edu.unbosque.venta.service that return FacturaDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FacturaDTO
    VentaService.obtenerFactura(Long codigoVenta)
    Generates a complete invoice using the sale information, client data, and product details.
